polygraph_rules: Polygraph equipment may appear but should not dominate the image.
Do not imply guaranteed truth detection.

problem_scene: fuel tanker truck or transport fleet depot with signs of suspicious fuel transfer into unmarked containers
commercial truck parked in a transport depot with a discreet fuel siphoning situation
fleet yard at night suggesting possible unauthorized fuel diversion without showing readable text
investigation_scene: transport company managers reviewing fuel consumption records and route reports
fleet supervisor reviewing refueling records, mileage data, and fuel card usage
internal investigation meeting about fuel discrepancies in a transport company
analysis_scene: fuel consumption records, route analysis, and preparation of specific investigation questions
fuel card reports, mileage records, and route documents reviewed on a desk
professional analysis of transport fuel discrepancies and operational records

problem_scene: warehouse or logistics storage area showing missing inventory, open boxes, and stock discrepancies
employee discreetly removing products from a warehouse without aggressive or criminalized imagery
logistics warehouse scene suggesting inventory discrepancy and internal control concerns
investigation_scene: manager reviewing warehouse records and stock movement reports
internal audit of warehouse inventory records in a logistics office
professional review of stock access and inventory control documents
analysis_scene: inventory reports, access logs, and stock movement analysis
warehouse audit documentation and preparation of investigation questions
analysis of inventory discrepancy records in a professional setting

problem_scene: professional financial office with evidence of account discrepancies and confidential internal review
banking or financial services environment suggesting internal fraud investigation
financial records and audit materials reviewed in a confidential corporate setting
investigation_scene: compliance managers reviewing financial discrepancy reports
internal audit meeting in a financial institution
professional review of access permissions and financial transaction records
analysis_scene: financial documents, transaction reports, and preparation of investigation questions
audit reports and account discrepancy analysis in a professional office
confidential review of financial records and internal controls

problem_scene: confidential workplace integrity concern in a financial services office without showing drug use
professional office environment suggesting sensitive employee conduct review
manager reviewing confidential workplace conduct concerns in a private office
investigation_scene: professional confidential meeting about workplace integrity concerns
HR and compliance review of employee conduct concerns
private discussion of workplace policy and employee suitability concerns
analysis_scene: confidential notes, workplace policy documents, and preparation of specific questions
professional review of workplace incident documentation
analysis of employee conduct records in a confidential setting

problem_scene: professional consultation before a polygraph evaluation in a modern office
investigation_scene: examiner and client reviewing clear written questions before a polygraph evaluation
analysis_scene: professional review of case notes and preparation of polygraph questions

problem_scene.purpose: Represent the concrete business problem or investigated situation.
avoid: documents-only scene unless the issue is documentary fraud

investigation_scene.purpose: Represent professional internal review, interviews, or case assessment.

analysis_scene.purpose: Represent document review, records analysis, route analysis, access logs, or question preparation.
